title: Add more managed columns for Pro accounts
excerpt:
Description
Currently, the ability to have “Managed Columns” for Pro users is 3, and it would be very benefitial if this number were larger. 
What are you trying to achieve
Have more than 3 managed columns in Work Manage…

posts.author: TanjaOps (Tanja)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, the ability to have “Managed Columns” for Pro users is 3, and it would be very benefitial if this number were larger.

What are you trying to achieve

Have more than 3 managed columns in Work Management, without the need to upgrade to Enterprise
